summary: Iteration 134 - Testing: CelebrateManager 1499 products, Service Box 13-pillar services, Bundle pricing PATCH. All 15 backend tests PASSED. All critical frontend features verified working. One UI issue: Service Box still shows 'shop' as pillar filter button (should be removed per requirement).

ui_bugs.issue: Service Box filter shows 'shop' as pillar button (14 pillars shown). Requirement says 13 pillars (no shop). Clicking shop shows 388 Inactive services. Remove 'shop' from ALL_PILLARS array in ServiceBox.jsx (line 42) to hide shop from filter buttons.

issues: Shows 'Manage all 1102 services across 14 pillars' - should say 13 pillars since shop is being deprecated

action_items: Remove 'shop' from ALL_PILLARS array in /app/frontend/src/components/admin/ServiceBox.jsx (line 42) to hide shop pillar filter button
Update ServiceBox.jsx header text from '14 pillars' to '13 pillars' after removing shop
critical_code_review_comments: ServiceBox.jsx ALL_PILLARS still includes shop (line 42). Backend has 0 active shop services (correct), but shop pillar filter button is still visible in UI. When clicked, shows 388 inactive shop services - could confuse admins.

CelebrateManager navigation from iteration_133 is FIXED - Admin > 14 PILLARS > Celebrate now correctly renders CelebrateManager (Admin.jsx line 3869: {activeTab === 'celebrate' && <CelebrateManager/>})

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All P0 features working, 1 minor UI issue (shop pillar filter still visible)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 134 verified: (1) Admin > 14 PILLARS > Celebrate = CelebrateManager loads with 1499 products stat, 50/page pagination, Shopify badge on products_master items, 'All Categories (1499)' filter, Upload Image + AI Generate buttons in edit modal - all PASS. (2) Service Box: 13 pillars active (care=76, fit=74, advisory=228, etc.), shop has 0 active services (388 inactive). But shop filter button still shown in ServiceBox.jsx ALL_PILLARS. (3) PATCH /api/bundles/celebrate-birthday-bundle/pricing returns 200 with updated bundle. All backend APIs fully working. One remaining minor issue: remove shop from ServiceBox pillar filters.

celebrate_manager_navigation.evidence: Admin > 14 PILLARS > Celebrate clicks correctly renders CelebrateManager with 1499 Products stat

celebrate_products_count_1499.evidence: Stats card shows '1499 Products', API returns total=1499, 'Showing 1-50 of 1499 products' visible

celebrate_pagination.evidence: Previous/Next buttons visible, 50 product cards per page, productTotal > 50 condition satisfied

shopify_badge.evidence: 47 Shopify badges visible on product cards from products_master source

category_filter_1499.evidence: Category dropdown shows 'All Categories (1499)', '1499 products total' label visible

image_upload_ai_generate.evidence: Edit Product modal has 'Upload Image' label and 'AI Generate' button (data-testid='generate-product-image-btn')

service_box_13_pillars.evidence: All 13 expected pillars have services: care(76), fit(74), advisory(228), celebrate(48), dine(26), stay(56), travel(43), farewell(19), emergency(27), adopt(23), paperwork(33), enjoy(29), learn(32)

shop_pillar_zero_active.evidence: GET /api/service-box/services?pillar=shop&is_active=true returns total=0. UI shows all 388 shop services as 'Inactive'

shop_pillar_hidden_from_filter.evidence: Shop filter button still visible in ServiceBox.jsx pillar filters. 14 pillars shown instead of 13. ALL_PILLARS in ServiceBox.jsx still includes shop at line 42.

bundle_pricing_patch.evidence: PATCH /api/bundles/celebrate-birthday-bundle/pricing returns 200 with bundle data including updated original_price
